message:
feat(node): gate extended API/policy surfaces behind extended-surfaces feature flag

Add #[cfg(any(test, feature = "extended-surfaces"))] gates across api
and policy modules to reduce the default binary compile surface while
preserving full test coverage via cfg(test).

api/error.rs: Gate ProblemDetail, severity/code helpers, and non-essential
ApiError variants (AuthFailed, PolicyDenied, RateLimited, NotFound,
Conflict, ServiceDegraded); BadRequest and Internal remain unconditional.

api/fleet_quarantine.rs: Gate fleet constants, invariant tags, domain
types (QuarantineScope, RevocationScope, FleetAction), error variants,
event constructors, manager methods, request/response types, and API
handlers. Core fleet operations (release, reconcile) remain unconditional.

api/middleware.rs: Gate authentication, authorization, rate limiting,
request logging, endpoint grouping, route metadata, and the full
middleware chain behind the feature flag.

api/trust_card_routes.rs: Gate TrustCardInput/Mutation imports and
create/update handlers.

policy/bayesian_diagnostics.rs: Gate with_epoch, candidates_seen, to_json.
policy/guardrail_monitor.rs: Gate threshold event code, is_blocked,
GuardrailRejection, and evaluation methods.
policy/hardening_state_machine.rs: Gate event_codes, level enumeration,
rollback artifacts, transition records, and the full state machine.
policy/policy_explainer.rs: Gate EVD_EXPLAIN_004 and to_json.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
